reasoning: Based on official ITKF website text describing Egypt as 'host nation and reigning world champion' as of November 2024, combined with Egypt's strong institutional capacity and status as 2024 world champion with 38+ athletes. However, uncertainty remains because ITKF typically announces hosts close to event dates (Portugal announced only 2 months before 2024 championship), and the phrasing could be aspirational. The tight timeline (only ~7 weeks from forecast cutoff to July 1, 2025) adds additional uncertainty.
